AI Governance + Security

Your AI tools are already
making decisions. Do you know what obligations that creates?

Axionly delivers a structured, 5-day AI audit that maps your regulatory exposure and security posture — before it becomes a compliance emergency.

Book your audit See how it works
AI Risk Report 5 days
✓ Systems mapped & classified
✓ EU AI Act obligations identified
✓ Security vulnerabilities assessed
! 2 high-priority remediations
Prioritised remediation roadmap included

The problem

Most companies using AI
have never asked the question.

They use it to write content, screen candidates, talk to customers, analyse data. What very few have done is stop and ask: are we doing this safely? Are we doing this legally?

  • ? Is the AI processing personal data under GDPR?
  • ? Does it qualify as a high-risk system under the EU AI Act?
  • ? Can a user manipulate it to leak sensitive information?

These aren't hypothetical risks. The EU AI Act is in force. GDPR enforcement is increasing. The cybersecurity vulnerabilities that come with AI deployment — prompt injection, data leakage, uncontrolled vendor access — are real, and they are growing.

The engagement

Five business days.
One clear answer.

A fixed-scope engagement that gives your legal team, IT team, and leadership a single source of truth on your AI risk. No abstract frameworks. No months-long consultancies.

  1. 01

    Map

    We inventory every AI system in use across your organisation, including third-party tools and vendor integrations.

  2. 02

    Classify

    We apply the EU AI Act risk classification framework to each system and identify applicable legal obligations.

  3. 03

    Assess

    We test for security vulnerabilities: prompt injection, data leakage, unauthorised access, and uncontrolled vendor behaviour.

  4. 04

    Report

    You receive a structured report with findings, risk ratings, and a prioritised remediation roadmap.

Why Axionly

Legal expertise alone isn't enough anymore.

Most AI auditors come from a legal or compliance background. We come from both governance and cybersecurity. That means we don't just review documentation — we probe your systems.

We find what's actually vulnerable, not just what looks compliant on paper. We identify which vendor contracts expose your data, and which internal practices would fail a technical audit today.

Governance + Cybersecurity

We don't just tell you which systems trigger the EU AI Act — we also tell you which ones are vulnerable to attack.

Fixed Scope, Fixed Timeline

Five business days. A defined deliverable. No open-ended retainers or vague consulting engagements.

EU AI Act Specialists

We work specifically with the EU regulatory environment — Romania and EU organisations preparing for enforcement.

Actionable Report

Not a list of obligations. A prioritised remediation roadmap that tells you exactly what to fix, and in what order.

Who we work with

You might be ready for this audit if…

We work with mid-size companies and enterprises across Romania and the European Union — organisations that are already using AI, know the regulatory environment is tightening, and want to get ahead of it.

  • You use AI across your team — but no policy governs it.

    Your team uses AI for hiring, content creation, or customer interactions. Nobody has formally reviewed the legal implications. You're not sure what obligations have already attached.

  • You're approaching an EU AI Act deadline.

    You know the regulation is in force, but you don't know where your actual exposure sits. You need a clear picture before a regulator, a breach, or a legal dispute forces the issue.

  • Your legal team is asking questions your tech team can't answer.

    There's a gap between what your lawyers are asking and what your engineers can explain. Axionly bridges that gap with a report both sides can read and act on.

Ready to get started?

Get clarity before it becomes a crisis.

Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll tell you whether you need an audit and exactly what it would cover.
